nasb.text: Then you shall eat the offspring of your own body, the flesh of your sons and of your daughters whom the Lord your God has given you, during the siege and the distress by which your enemy will oppress you.

esv.text: And you shall eat the fruit of your womb, the flesh of your sons and daughters, whom the Lord your God has given you, in the siege and in the distress with which your enemies shall distress you.

cnv.text: 你在仇敵圍困和窘迫你的時候，要吃你身所生的，就是吃耶和華你的　神賜給你的兒女的肉。

ccb.text: “当你们被敌人围困、陷入绝境时，你们必吃自己的亲生骨肉——你们的上帝耶和华赐给你们的儿女。
